mapper.sql: id, user_id, goods_id, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_favorite (id, user_id, goods_id, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{goodsId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.delete: UPDATE t_favorite SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND goods_id = #{goodsId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_favorite SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND goods_id = #{goodsId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
